description: You are an internal audit specialist at NorthBridge Financial Group. Finalize the Q3 2024 Internal Audit Report (/home/ga/Documents/audit_draft.docx) for the Audit Committee according to IIA standards and firm requirements. Enclose the 'Executive Summary' section, including the heading and summary text, within a single-cell table with a visible border. Format the five audit findings headings using 'Heading 2' style, prefixing each with 'Finding [N]: ' (e.g., 'Finding 1: Access Control Deficiencies'). In the Risk Ratings Summary table, format the header row with bold text on a dark gray (#404040) background, and color the 'High', 'Medium', and 'Low' text in the Risk Rating column red, orange/amber, and green respectively. Add a footer to every page with 'Internal Audit Report — Q3 2024 | DRAFT' left-aligned and 'NorthBridge Financial Group' right-aligned. On the last page, include a 'Report Sign-Off' section featuring a single-cell bordered table with signature lines for 'Chief Audit Executive:', 'Date:', and 'Audit Committee Chair:'. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/audit_final.docx.
